description: Nick White discusses the challenges and potential of Celestia as a modular blockchain, its applications, and the current sentiment towards it in the crypto community.
topic_summary: In this podcast, Nick White explains Celestia's role in the blockchain ecosystem, emphasizing its modular design and applications like Converge and Towns. He addresses the mixed perceptions of Celestia in the crypto space, particularly following its initial hype in 2023 [t=377.36].
